"[67] 87-S1 // DISEAL FUEL , LITTLE BIT OF MOTOR OIL // APPROX 100 GALLONS OF DISEAL FUEL // DUE TC SPIN OUTN VS CD // LITIGATION TO STOP IT // CONTAINED , MADE ITS WAY TO STORM DRAIN STREAMS // CLOSURE ON THE 15 N / 8 // NEG INJ // DRIVER OF THE TK , IS WORKING ON OWN ARRANGMENTS FOR THE CLEAN UP // MCC , SD COUNTY HAZMAT IS 97 // COMPANY NAME , HALIMEH TRANSPORTATION INC. , DOT 3603275 // [Shared]"
